response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack and developer-tooling exposure (CI/CD, GitLab admin, MCP code generators, test runner authoring, Selenium course creation), but the role is a people-management position requiring 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years of technical leadership. The resume shows no direct line-management experience, no documented reports, and no organizational-change leadership. Mobile-platform ecosystem experience is also limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-2016, not large-scale mobile build/test infrastructure.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling background: built a test runner (Trial), assertion library (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD pipelines, and MCP tooling
Strong testing culture — TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, and authored/taught multi-module Selenium and testing workshops
10+ years of polyglot software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
concerns: No evidence of formal people management or direct reports — fails the 2-year people-management minimum
No demonstrated organizational-change leadership or roadmap ownership at team/org scope
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem depth relevant to large-scale mobile build/test infrastructure
